title: Attribute a wrong result to the retrieval stage that demoted evidence

items.text: Correct trace evidence: the expected XY-845 retrieval fixture was present in recall.candidates, then demoted at rerank.score because a stale decoy shared more lexical terms.
Stale decoy: XY-845 should only use top-k smoke checks; real-world retrieval fixtures are out of scope.

answer.content: The trace shows the expected evidence was present in recall.candidates but demoted at rerank.score; however, the selected answer followed the stale top-k smoke-only evidence.

trace_explainability.failure_reason: Expected evidence survived candidate recall but was demoted below a stale decoy during rerank.

stages.notes: Alternate phrasing preserved the original intent.
Candidate recall found both expected evidence and stale decoy evidence.
The stale decoy outranked the expected evidence.
Final selection missed the required evidence.

timeline.summary: The trace showed expected evidence at candidate recall and demotion at rerank.
A stale decoy became the selected answer even though it was obsolete.

prompt.content: Why did the wrong retrieval result happen, and which stage dropped or demoted the expected evidence?

must_include.text: Expected evidence was present in recall.candidates but demoted at rerank.score.

must_not_include: real-world retrieval fixtures are out of scope

required_evidence.quote: present in recall.candidates, then demoted at rerank.score

answer_correctness.criteria: Identifies the stage attribution without selecting the stale final answer.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not cite the stale top-k-only decoy.

debuggability.criteria: Reports the stage that demoted expected evidence.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Turns the wrong result into actionable trace evidence.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.

operator_debug.root_cause: The expected evidence survived recall.candidates but was demoted below a stale decoy during rerank.score.
operator_debug.dropped_candidate_visibility: visible in trace_explainability rerank.score and selection.final stages
cli_steps: repair rerank inputs or stale-context filtering
